search:typescript-eslint-rules:typescrip.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `npm install eslint --save-dev`
  - `npx eslint --init` to set up ESLint in your project

- **Latest Versions**:
  - ESLint: v9.x
  - Prettier: v3.x
  - TypeScript: v5.x

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `"extends": ["eslint:recommended", "plugin:@typescript-eslint/recommended"]`
  - `"parserOptions": { "ecmaVersion": 2021, "sourceType": "module" }`
  - `"plugins": ["@typescript-eslint"]`
  - `"rules": { "@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any": "error" }`

- Install ESLint globally using `npm install -g eslint`
- Initialize ESLint in your project with `eslint --init`
- Use the latest version of TypeScript ESLint by installing it via npm: `npm install @typescript-eslint/parser @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin`
- Configure ESLint to work with TypeScript by creating or updating an `.eslintrc.json` file:
  ```json
  {
    "parser": "@typescript-eslint/parser",
    "plugins": ["@typescript-eslint"],
    "extends": [
      "eslint:recommended",
      "plugin:@typescript-eslint/recommended"
    ]
  }
  ```
- Use the `--fix` flag to automatically fix linting errors when running ESLint.
- Consider using Prettier for code formatting and integrate it with ESLint by installing `prettier`, `@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin-prettier`, and `eslint-config-prettier`.
- Configure Prettier in your `.eslintrc.json`:
  ```json
  {
    "plugins": ["@typescript-eslint", "prettier"],
    "extends": [
      "plugin:@typescript-eslint/recommended",
      "plugin:prettier/recommended"
    ]
  }
  ```
- Run ESLint on your project with `eslint .`
- Regularly update ESLint and related packages to benefit from the latest features and security patches.

search:typescript-eslint-rules:advanced.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `npm install typescript @typescript-eslint/parser @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin --save-dev`
  - `npx eslint --init` to set up ESLint with TypeScript support

- **Latest Versions**:
  - ESLint v9.25.0 (released Apr 18, 2025)
  - typescript-eslint/parser and @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin are regularly updated to support new TypeScript features

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `"parser": "@typescript-eslint/parser"`
  - `"plugins": ["@typescript-eslint"]`
  - `"extends": "eslint:recommended", "plugin:@typescript-eslint/recommended"`

These actions will help developers integrate and leverage advanced TypeScript ESLint rules effectively.
